title: Verify and document NEXTAUTH_URL configuration across all environments
perceive: Signal signal-migrated-db317a893d7a (impact=8) documents critical auth misconfiguration: NEXTAUTH_URL must be the base domain only, not the full callback path. Verify and document the current configuration across all environments to prevent OAuth flow breakage.
execute: 1. Locate all environment configuration sources: .env files, CI/CD secrets manager, deployment manifests, Docker Compose, Kubernetes configs.
2. Extract NEXTAUTH_URL value from each environment (local, staging, production).
3. Verify each value matches the pattern (base domain only, no callback path); flag any that include /api/auth/callback or similar.
4. Create a verification summary document: WAI-Spoke/advisors/security_sensitive/NEXTAUTH_CONFIG_AUDIT.md with findings per environment.
5. If any misconfiguration found, open a follow-up critical bug lug with exact file paths and proposed fixes.
verify: NEXTAUTH_CONFIG_AUDIT.md exists and documents the NEXTAUTH_URL values for all environments; any misconfigurations are flagged with file paths.
acceptance_criteria: Verification covers local, staging, and production environments
Each NEXTAUTH_URL value is documented with its source file path
Any misconfiguration is flagged and documented
completion_notes: Verification complete. All environments (local, staging, production) correctly configured with base domain only NEXTAUTH_URL. No callback paths detected. Audit document created at WAI-Spoke/advisors/security_sensitive/NEXTAUTH_CONFIG_AUDIT.md. No follow-up bug lugs needed.
